Owner & Lead Stylist

Victoria Itua
Meet Victoria

Passion. Craft.
Confidence.

Victoria is a Tampa-based beauty professional with years of hands-on expertise in hair and makeup. She built Victoria Beauty Parlor from the ground up, one transformation at a time.

Every client who sits in her chair receives personalized attention, professional-grade results, and the kind of care that keeps them coming back.

"Confidence starts with how you feel. I make sure you feel unstoppable."

Our Story

Built on Passion.
Driven by Purpose.

"Confidence starts with how you feel. I make sure you feel unstoppable."

Victoria Itua is a Tampa-based beauty professional and founder of Victoria Beauty Parlor. She built her career from a genuine love for the art of transformation.

Starting with hair installations and growing into a full-service beauty destination, Victoria consistently delivers excellence in every chair, every face, every look.

 Instagram
What Sets Us Apart

The Victoria Beauty Difference

🎯

Personalized Attention

Every appointment starts with a consultation. Your look is uniquely yours.

💎

Premium Quality Only

From the hair we sell to the products we use, only the best makes it into our space.

✨

Results You Will Love

We are not done until you love what you see. Your satisfaction is the only finish line.

❤️

A Safe, Welcoming Space

A place where you can relax, be yourself, and leave feeling like the best version of you.

the Difference

Full Service Menu

Hair & Makeup Services

Professional services with expert hands and a commitment to making you look your absolute best.

Hair Services
Wig Installation

Full lace or lace front install with natural finish. Includes pre-trim, bleached knots option, and styling.

From $120
Wig Customization

Lace tinting, knot bleaching, plucking, and shaping to match your exact hairline.

From $85
Braiding

Knotless, box braids, feed-in, and protective styles. Neat, long-lasting, and always on-trend.

From $150
Styling & Blowout

Sleek and polished or big and voluminous — every style finished to perfection.

From $65
Hair Treatments

Deep conditioning, scalp treatments, and protein masks to restore and strengthen.

From $55

What to Know

Before Your Visit

Everything you need to know to make the most of your appointment.

Free Consultation

Every appointment begins with a brief consultation so Victoria understands exactly the look you want.

Come Prepared

For installs, arrive with clean, stretched hair. For styling, freshly washed is ideal.

Deposit Required

A 30% deposit secures your booking. Remaining balance is due day of service.

Cancellation Policy

Please give at least 24 hours notice. Deposits are non-refundable for no-shows.

Prefer to book directly? Message Victoria on WhatsApp for fast responses.

WhatsApp: +1 (813) 391-6251
